notes.name: memory-ux-overhaul
notes.hook: Memory shows a clear inbox, capture health, provider coverage, evidence, history, snapshots, and recovery without technical babysitting.

notes.name: runtime-architecture-no-hermes
notes.hook: Claude and Codex direct terminal work stays in the current repository; Swarm cards and project id lookup are never implicit.

notes.name: memory-analysis-provider-neutral
notes.hook: Claude and Codex transcripts enter one provider-aware capture queue and bounded provider-neutral analysis pipeline.

notes.name: memory-reconcile-dedup-gotcha
notes.hook: Whole-note duplicate similarity misses repeated bullets in long notes and causes memory bloat.

notes.name: memory-trust-modes
notes.hook: Memory conflict decisions follow explicit trust modes, evidence, a ledger, and owner control instead of newer-wins.

notes.name: live-notification-requirement
notes.hook: Tab-independent bottom-right notifications report important bugs and errors with bounded context and one next action.

notes.name: openrouter-secret-ref-gotcha
notes.hook: OpenRouter settings, usage, and engine calls share one canonical encrypted secret ref with legacy migration.

notes.name: hermes-jarvis-plan
notes.hook: Historical background orchestrator and automatic card dispatch plan.

cases.query: memory ekranında capture health provider coverage evidence history ve recovery tek yerde anlaşılır olsun
Claude Codex direct terminal işi repository içinde yapsın swarm card ve project id istemesin
hem claude hem codex transcript aynı provider aware capture queue ile memory öğrensin
uzun memory notlarında aynı maddeler tekrar tekrar ekleniyor madde bazında duplicate yakala
memory conflict için evidence trust policy ledger olsun newer wins olmasın
uygulamada hangi sekmede olursam olayım hata çıkınca sağ altta notification göster ve next action ver
OpenRouter secret ref settings usage engine arasında aynı olsun legacy key migrate edilsin
